content: I want to discuss the situation with unstable features again. Before the meeting, would someone be able to collect a list of the unstable features we are still missing? I only see the new_uninit feature on rust-dev. I recall there being something related to Arc, but maybe we don't have that upstream yet?
It should be a similar set to https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/2 (depending on how things arrive at mainline finally).
